title: Specsmakers South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Specsmakers South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Specsmakers South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Specsmakers South Asia Partners:
Specsmakers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers South Asia Partners!
